title: Volume-sweep microstructure
question: Do cross-ticker abnormal-volume sweeps predict next-day semi-basket returns?
finding: Clean null. On the full ~5yr sample, no sweep type beats the basket's next-day drift once dependence-adjusted, multiplicity-corrected, benchmarked vs random entry, and split out-of-sample. The pilot's BUY signal was small-sample noise and the "MIXED" cell is negative (−0.05%, p≈0.67), sign-unstable, and beaten by random entry.
